task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application is open and the 'Plan' view is active (typically indicated by a highlighted 'Plan' button at the top of the window).

task_completion.description: Add a Survey pattern to the mission
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Survey' item is visible in the mission item list on the right side of the screen, and/or a survey polygon grid is visible on the map.

In the Survey settings panel, the camera is set to 'Custom Camera' with the following values entered: Sensor width: 7.68, Sensor height: 6.14, Image width: 640, Image height: 512, and Focal length: 14.0.
In the Survey settings panel, the Altitude is set to 35 m, Turnaround dist is set to 15 m, and the 'Hover and capture' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Save the mission plan to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Mission' dialog or a file manager window shows the mission being saved as 'thermal_survey.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure the mission
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QGroundControl interface to set parameters, rather than a text editor manually writing a .plan JSON file.

integrity.description: Agent did not launch the vehicle
integrity.visual_evidence: The vehicle status should remain 'Disarmed' or 'Not Ready', and there should be no evidence of an active flight in the 'Fly' view.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The file should be saved using QGC's 'File' or 'Sync' menu (e.g., 'Save to File'), not by copying a pre-existing file via the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target camera specifications are: Sensor Width 7.68mm, Sensor Height 6.14mm, Image Width 640px, Image Height 512px, Focal Length 14.0mm. The survey flight mechanics are: Altitude 35.0m, Turnaround distance 15.0m, and 'Hover and capture' must be checked. The final mission plan must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/thermal_survey.plan'.
